title: aria torminalis
intro: Aria torminalis, also known as the bitter orange or torminal, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aria torminalis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
